privileged_info_summary: The AuPbSn 40 sample referenced in this task exists as AuPbSn40.jpg (600x412 pixels) in the imagej.net/images/ archive, but is NOT registered as a built-in sample in Fiji's File > Open Samples menu. Only 4 samples are officially registered in the Fiji Samples plugin: Malaria Sporozoites, First-instar brain, Centipede Drawing, and Centipede Mivart. The expected boundary length threshold (100 pixels) and density constraints (0 < density < 1.0) match the verifier implementation. The expected minimum density of 0.01 is not enforced by the verifier. The sample data is real (from imagej.net), not synthetic.
